db55aa7f14779a1813cbe7508338ab3bc310d84c:
query Members($skip: Int, $take: Int, $filter: MemberFilterInput, $order: [MemberSortInput!]) {
  members(skip: $skip, take: $take, where: $filter, order: $order) {
    pageInfo {
      hasNextPage
      hasPreviousPage
    }
    totalCount
    items {
      additionalInformation
      address
      category
      commencementYear
      createdBy
      employeeDetails
      ghanaCardNumber
      createdOn
      description
      email
      id
      membershipDeclaration
      name
      operationalArea
      organization
      phoneNumber
      productMaterialCategory
      reason
      redgNo
      registeredBy
      revision
      status
      updatedBy
      updatedOn
    }
  }
}
